meaning: n.促进感受性,感光度之增强
examples: Sensitization and education of health and other service providers is therefore another important strategy.
Cytotoxic t cells, after sensitization by antigen, are effector cells, especially important in antiviral immunity.
Disease surveillance is being strengthened and case management, contact tracing, and sensitization of the affected population are being implemented.
The inclusion of stakeholders through sensitization campaigns and activity-integration is an important aspect of this project.
Initial training in textbook revision and sensitization to issues of quality education.
